pageContext.name: Suguru Geto (0 Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are excited to present a 1:8 scale figure from Jujutsu Kaisen 0, Suguru Geto!  Suguru Geto from Jujutsu Kaisen 0 comes to life in a 1:8 scale figure posed in a powerful stance gripping Playful Cloud. He stands at 8.86' and is seen wearing his monk attire with black yukata robes, white tabi socks, and zori sandals.  Be sure to add this Suguru Geto Collectible Statue to Jujutsu Kaisen collection today!
